name: Chocolate Meringue Puffs
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate over low heat. Set aside.
2. Beat egg whites with salt until foamy.
3. Gradually add sugar, beating continuously until stiff and glossy.
4. Add vinegar and vanilla; beat in.
5. Gently fold in melted chocolate and nuts.
6. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 10 minutes.
8. Cool on a rack. Makes about 3-1/2 dozen cookies.
